scripts.name: World Message Broadcaster
scripts.author: ElunaLuaEngine community
scripts.description: Broadcasts server-wide messages on a schedule: every N seconds, or weekly at a fixed day and time.
scripts.setup: Edit the Register table at the top of the file to write your own messages (Open folder → edit → Reload Eluna).

scripts.name: Dynamic Teleporter
scripts.author: ElunaLuaEngine community
scripts.description: Turns an NPC into a teleporter with faction-aware gossip menus: Horde/Alliance cities, Outland, Northrend and PvP arenas, ready to use.
scripts.setup: Set UnitEntry at the top of the file to the creature entry of the NPC that should offer the menu, then reload.

scripts.name: Weapon Enchant Visuals
scripts.author: Rochet2
scripts.description: 25% of looted weapons get a random enchant glow. Purely visual, fully automatic — it manages its own table in the characters database and real enchants always win.

scripts.name: Transmogrifier
scripts.author: Rochet2
scripts.description: The classic transmogrification NPC: change how equipped gear looks while keeping its stats, via a gossip menu. Stores its data in its own characters-database table.
scripts.setup: Spawn (or repurpose) a creature with entry 60000 to be the Transmogrifier, or edit NPC_Entry at the top of the file.

scripts.name: Run Eluna Command
scripts.author: ElunaLuaEngine community
scripts.description: Adds a GM-only chat command (.eluna <lua>) that runs Lua on the live server — great for testing your own scripts. Requires GM rank 3.

scripts.name: GM Login Announcer
scripts.author: ElunaLuaEngine community
scripts.description: Announces to the whole server when a GM (rank 2+) logs in or out.

scripts.name: Level-Up Reward
scripts.author: 55Honey & Ragundah
scripts.description: Mails players a reward — gold and/or items — when they reach configured level milestones, with an optional 'you were the Nth adventurer to reach level X' counter mail.
scripts.setup: Rewards, mail texts and the sender NPC are all configured in the tables at the top of the file (default mails are themed for ChromieCraft — reword them for your server).

scripts.name: Recruit a Friend
scripts.author: 55Honey
scripts.description: Standalone Recruit-a-Friend: linked recruits level with permanent rested XP, the recruiter can summon them (.raf summon) and gets mailed rewards when a recruit reaches the target level. Includes same-IP abuse checks.
scripts.setup: A GM (rank 3) links accounts with .bindraf <recruitAccountId> <recruiterAccountId>; players type .raf for help. Target level, rewards and anti-abuse options are at the top of the file.

scripts.name: Send & Bind
scripts.author: 55Honey
scripts.description: GM mail command that sends an item to a player and makes it arrive already soulbound — built for webshops, so Bind-on-Equip stock can't be traded on.
scripts.setup: GM rank 2+ · syntax: .senditemandbind <characterGuid> <itemEntry> <amount> [mail text]. Writes a send-and-bind.log next to the script.

scripts.name: Timed Announcements
scripts.author: 55Honey
scripts.description: Schedule repeating server-wide announcements from chat or console: every N minutes, X times. Scheduled announcements are stored in their own database table and survive restarts.
scripts.setup: GM rank 2+ · .tannounce <minutes> <repetitions> <text> to create, .tannounce list and .tannounce delete <id> to manage.

scripts.name: Summon All
scripts.author: 55Honey
scripts.description: Adds a .summonall chat command: a group member summons their whole party or raid to where they stand. No GM rank needed — a quality-of-life command for everyone.
scripts.setup: Allowed continents are configured at the top of the file (all four are enabled by default). The summoner must be in a party or raid and out of combat.
